title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Airtel India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Airtel India
jsonLd.description:
Join the Airtel India family as a Frontend Developer in Indore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Airtel India:
Airtel India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Airtel India!
